title: SBK Painting Pack
description: This Minecraft texture pack overwrites existing 1x1, 2x2, and 3x3 paintings within the game - replacing them with 19 new, original paintings! All are based directly on kingdoms from the Skyblock Kingdoms SMP!
body:
This Minecraft texture pack overwrites existing 2x2 paintings and 3x3 paintings within the game - replacing them with 10 new, original paintings! All paintings are directly based on kingdoms from the Skyblock Kingdoms SMP!

Current version: 1.3 for 1.21
